data.description:
## Context
4af8 injected the vendor MAPPER entrypoint into the differ/apply core, but a documented residual of adapters.jira imports remained (epic bbf1 AC3 requires ZERO): outbound_differ's non-mapping field helpers (_diff_fields/_extract_jira_field/_assignee_matches/_LOCAL_TO_JIRA_TYPE), outbound_links' relocated _RELATION_TO_JIRA_LINK, fetcher/applier's resolve_jira_settings().project, apply_handlers' AssigneeNotFoundError, and _attestation's JIRA_* fail-fast. This extends the Backend port to cover them so the core is fully vendor-neutral.

## Approach (behaviour-preserving)
Extend the port (_backend.py): OutboundMapper gains diff_fields/extract_field/assignee_matches/local_type_to_remote; SupportsLinks gains link_type_for_relation; Backend gains project (DIG-defaulted, applier guard) + query_project (un-defaulted, fetcher fail-closed JQL) read-only accessors; a neutral BackendAssigneeNotFoundError base (adapters.jira AssigneeNotFoundError subclasses it); JiraBackend.assert_env_ready() carries the bootstrap JIRA_* fail-fast. Route outbound_differ/outbound_links/fetcher/applier/apply_handlers/_attestation through the port; delete every adapters.jira/acli_subprocess import from those six core modules. Extend the neutrality gate to AST-assert zero such imports (module-level AND function-nested).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] outbound_differ.py, outbound_links.py, fetcher.py, applier.py, apply_handlers.py, _attestation.py contain NO adapters.jira / acli_subprocess import (module-level or function-nested) — verified by the AST neutrality gate.
- [ ] The Backend port carries the field helpers, link resolver, project accessors, and neutral assignee exception; the Jira adapter implements them; behaviour is identical (assignee soft-fail, cross-project guard, fetcher fail-closed JQL, _attestation JIRA_* fail-fast all preserved).
- [ ] Full reconcile unit+integration suite green; whole test tree collects with 0 errors; make lint && make typecheck && make test green.
data.title: Complete core vendor-neutrality: extend Backend port so zero adapters.jira imports remain in the reconciler core (epic bbf1 AC3)
